title: ctenitis mexicana
intro: Ctenitis mexicana, a type of fern plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis mexicana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
